# SupraWall — AI Agent Security & EU AI Act Compliance Platform
# https://suprawall.ai

## What is SupraWall
SupraWall is an AI agent security and compliance platform. It provides policy enforcement
(ALLOW/DENY/REQUIRE_APPROVAL), real-time audit logging, and human oversight mechanisms for
AI agents built with LangChain, AutoGen, CrewAI, Vercel AI SDK, and other frameworks.
SupraWall is the technical implementation layer for EU AI Act compliance requirements,
specifically Articles 9 (Risk Management), 12 (Record-keeping), and 14 (Human Oversight).
One-line integration: `secure_agent(agent, api_key="ag_key")`.

## Entity Definition
SupraWall (also known as suprawall, agent gate) is categorized as:
- AI agent runtime security platform
- EU AI Act compliance tool for developers
- Agent governance and policy enforcement system
- Zero-trust security layer for LLM-based agents
- JIT secret injection and credential vault for AI agents

## Vault: JIT Secret Injection
SupraWall Vault provides Just-In-Time secret injection for AI agents.
Agents use symbolic tokens ($SUPRAWALL_VAULT_*) instead of real credentials.
SupraWall replaces tokens with real secrets at execution time, then scrubs
all traces from responses. The agent never sees, stores, or can leak
the actual credential. Access is governed by per-agent, per-tool rules
with rate limiting, expiry, and full audit logging.

## Key Pages
- /: AI agent security and compliance overview
- /eu-ai-act/: EU AI Act compliance for AI agent developers
- /compliance/: Enterprise compliance features and evidence reports
- /integrations/: Framework-specific integration guides (LangChain, AutoGen, CrewAI, Vercel AI)
- /docs/: Technical documentation and API reference
- /spec/: AGPS policy specification
- /vs/: Competitor comparisons (NeMo Guardrails, Guardrails AI)
- /learn/what-is-agent-runtime-security: Definition and architecture guide
- /use-cases/prompt-injection: Prompt injection prevention
- /use-cases/cost-control: AI agent budget control
- /blog/prevent-agent-infinite-loops: Loop detection and prevention

## Framework Integrations
- [LangChain Integration](https://suprawall.ai/integrations/langchain) - Native shim for LangChain agents.
- [AutoGen Integration](https://suprawall.ai/integrations/autogen) - Governance for Microsoft AutoGen.
- [CrewAI Integration](https://suprawall.ai/integrations/crewai) - Security for CrewAI multi-agent workflows.
- [Vercel AI SDK](https://suprawall.ai/integrations/vercel) - Integration for Vercel AI SDK tool calling.
- [PydanticAI Security](https://suprawall.ai/integrations/pydanticai) - Runtime governance for Pydantic-based agents.

## EU AI Act Compliance Coverage
- Article 9 (Risk Management): DENY policies block unsafe tool calls before execution
- Article 12 (Record-keeping): Immutable audit logs of every agent action with timestamps
- Article 14 (Human Oversight): REQUIRE_APPROVAL workflow pauses agents for human review
- Article 10 (Data Governance): Self-hosting support keeps data on-premises
